channel.title: GrantOtter — Federal Funding Updates
channel.description: Aggregated weekly feed of grant opportunities and agency news from NIH, NSF, and DARPA.

item.title: Carbon Crunch
item.description: Carbon Crunch aims to enable scalable, fast, and agile production of hypersonic aeroshells. | See Program

item.title: Notice of NICHD Participation in PAR-24-204 "Summer Research Education Experience Program (R25 Clinical Trial Not Allowed)"
item.description: Notice NOT-HD-26-004 from the NIH Guide for Grants and Contracts

item.title: Harmonizing the NIH Definition of Intervention with the Common Rule
item.description: Notice NOT-OD-26-063 from the NIH Guide for Grants and Contracts

item.title: Notice of NHLBI Participation in PA-25-304 "NIH Exploratory/Developmental Research Project Grant (Parent R21 Clinical Trial Not Allowed)"
item.description: Notice NOT-HL-26-003 from the NIH Guide for Grants and Contracts

item.title: Notice to Rescind NOT-HL-23-070 "NHLBI Supplement to the NIH Policy for Data Management and Sharing"
item.description: Notice NOT-HL-26-004 from the NIH Guide for Grants and Contracts

item.title: Feedback Sought on NIH Draft Resources to Support Participants in Implantable Device Trials
item.description: We seek your input on two resources aimed at supporting participants in NIH-funded implantable device clinical trials. Comments on this Request for Information are voluntary and should be submitted electronically until May 25, 2026.

item.title: Draft NIH Resources to Support Implantable Device Trials
item.description: Notice NOT-OD-26-061 from the NIH Guide for Grants and Contracts

item.title: Publication of the Revised NIH Grants Policy Statement (Rev. March 2026) for Fiscal Year 2026
item.description: Notice NOT-OD-26-057 from the NIH Guide for Grants and Contracts

item.title: NSF initiative aims to make every American worker, business and community AI-ready
item.description: The U.S. National Science Foundation announced a new funding opportunity as part of an effort to enable all Americans to understand, apply and create with artificial intelligence. The NSF TechAccess: AI-Ready America (NSF AI-Ready America) initiative…

item.title: Notice of National Cancer Institutes Participation in PA-25-305, NIH Research Project Grant (Parent R01 Clinical Trial Required)
item.description: Notice NOT-CA-26-009 from the NIH Guide for Grants and Contracts

item.title: Prior Approval Requirement for Changes to Domestic Subawards
item.description: Notice NOT-OD-26-062 from the NIH Guide for Grants and Contracts

item.title: NIH Seeks Input on Framework for Next NIH-Wide Strategic Plan
item.description: NIH is seeking public input on a framework for the NIH-Wide Strategic Plan for fiscal years 2027–2031 through a newly issued request for information (RFI) . This RFI provides an opportunity for the extramural research community to help inform NIH’s highest-level priorities and goals for the next five years.

item.title: Notice of Participation of the National Center for Advancing Translational Sciences (NCATS) in PA-24-201, Emergency Competitive Revision to Existing NIH Awards (Emergency Supplement - Clinical Trial Optional)
item.description: Notice NOT-TR-26-008 from the NIH Guide for Grants and Contracts

item.title: NSF announces winners of the U.S. critical minerals challenge to secure key domestic supply chain
item.description: The U.S. National Science Foundation Directorate for Technology, Innovation and Partnerships (NSF TIP) announced eight winners of the Tech Metal Transformation Challenge launched by STRIDE Ventures...
